welcome: Welcome to Mafia Community, {name}! You received {coins} starter coins. Use /language to pick your language, /shop to browse perks.
shop_header: Perk Shop — earn coins by playing, claim /daily, share clips with /clip.
buy_not_found: Unknown perk code: {code}. Use /shop to see available perks.
buy_insufficient: Not enough coins. Perk costs {cost}, your balance is {coins}.
inventory_empty: You don't own any perks yet. Use /shop to see what's available.
daily_claimed: Daily bonus claimed: +{coins} coins (streak: {streak} days). Balance: {balance}.
daily_already: You already claimed today's bonus. Come back tomorrow!
daily_cap: Daily earn cap reached. Try again tomorrow.
clip_cap: You've hit the daily share reward cap (3/day). Keep sharing — no extra coins today.
brag: {name} is flexing! Balance: {coins} coins, {perks} perks owned, streak: {streak}.
report_need_reply: Reply to the offending message with /report.
translate_need_reply: Reply to a message with /translate to translate it.
rules:
Mafia Community Rules:
1. Respect everyone.
2. Be inclusive.
3. No cheats, exploits or leaks.
4. English in General, native in Language Rooms.
5. No spam or unsolicited DMs.
6. SFW only.
7. Critique ideas, not people.
8. Use /report, don't retaliate.
9. One account per player.
10. Have fun!
day_caption: ☀️ Day breaks over the town square. Time to debate and vote.
night_caption: 🌙 Night falls on whispered streets. The Mafia stirs...
game_need_group: Run game commands in a group chat.
game_lobby_open: 🎭 Lobby open! /join to enter. Need at least 4 players, /startgame to begin. Host: {host}.
game_already: A game is already running in this chat.
game_not_found: No active lobby. /newgame to create one.
game_started: 🎬 Game started! Roles sent in DM. NIGHT falls.
game_role_mafia: 🔪 You are MAFIA. Pick your nightly victim via the DM buttons. Allies: {allies}.
game_role_don: 👑 You are the DON of the Mafia. Your target overrides the regular Mafia's pick. Allies: {allies}.
game_role_sheriff: 🕵️ You are the SHERIFF. At night, investigate a player to learn if they are mafia.
game_role_doctor: ⚕️ You are the DOCTOR. At night, heal one player (not yourself) — they can't die this night.
game_role_lover: 💋 You are the LOVER. At night, visit a target — their night action fails.
game_role_maniac: 🔪 You are the MANIAC. Kill alone at night. Win if you're the last one standing (or 1-on-1 with a civilian).
game_role_civilian: 👤 You are a CIVILIAN. Survive and vote by day.
game_night: 🌙 NIGHT begins. You have {secs} seconds for DM actions.
game_day: ☀️ DAY begins. Discuss and vote: /vote <number>. Time: {secs} seconds.
game_action_dm_only: Send this command in a DM to the bot.
game_action_wrong_phase: Not the right phase for that action.
game_action_not_role: That command isn't for your role.
game_win_town: 🎉 TOWN wins! The Mafia has been wiped out.
game_win_mafia: 🔪 MAFIA wins! The town has fallen.
game_dm_ready: You're registered for Mafia. Role will arrive here when the host starts the game.
game_need_dm: Open a DM with the bot and press Start, then tap Join again.
not_host: Only the host can do that.
prompt_mkill: 🔪 Whom to kill (you are the Maniac)?
game_blocked_notice: 💋 The Lover visited you — your night action failed.
help_body: ❓ Help In groups: /newgame — open lobby /players — list players /cancelgame — cancel (host only) During game: All actions use buttons. Night actions in DM. Day voting in the group. In DM: /menu — main menu /balance — balance /daily — daily bonus
